instance EdgeComputingNode : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Edge computing node that performs initial noise filtering, outlier rejection, and aggregation of telemetry before forwarding to Digital Twin via AAS REST API."

]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live visualization dashboard enabling plant operators to view motion profiles, encoder velocity traces, and friction metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionProfileInsight
]

instance FrictionMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metric indicating quantified friction force per axial joint based on real‑time encoder data."
]

instance MotionProfileInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual trace of joint motion profiles and encoder velocity over time presented in the dashboard."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time data‑driven representation, with sensor data from the physical robot axis streamed to the twin via MQTT. The twin continuously processes incoming traces and updates its models (e.g., white‑ and black‑box friction models) during operation, effectively synchronizing with the physical system at the rate the data is produced. No explicit latency or frequency values are specified, but the architecture is designed for continuous, real‑time updates."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through Asset Administration Shells (AAS) to represent the physical and digital assets, and the twin streams data via MQTT. The AAS exposes the asset model and the twin subscribes/publishes to MQTT topics that carry trace data and state updates, enabling interoperability with enterprise systems that support AAS and MQTT."
]
